arts.ttl: Southampton 1-2 Liverpool: Player ratings as Reds survive Saints scare in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez took advantage of uncertainty in the Southampton backline to slot Liverpool in front after 24 minutes, with Harvey Elliott's effort doubling their lead eight minutes later following a slick move. Southampton pushed frantically for an equaliser and had some promising moments in the closing stages, with Jarell Quansah fortunate not to be sent off in second-half stoppage time as Liverpool narrowly held on to their lead.

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa sends message as Mohamed Salah difficulty becomes increasingly clear for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool analysis from St Mary's as the Reds beat Southampton 2-1 in the Carabao Cup quarter-final

arts.ttl: Slot serves ban as Liverpool reach Carabao semis
arts.sum: Holders Liverpool booked their berth in the Carabao Cup semifinals with a 2-1 victory over Southampton at a wet and windy St Mary's Stadium on Wednesday, thanks to goals from Darwin Nunez and Harvey Elliott.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot makes admission over Southampton red card appeal in tight Carabao Cup win
arts.sum: Reds book spot in semi-finals with 2-1 victory over Saints

arts.ttl: Arne Slot dismisses Liverpool red card claim after watching incident again
arts.sum: Arne Slot insisted he wasn't concerned about Jarell Quansah being dismissed late on as a much-changed Liverpool held on to beat Southampton

arts.ttl: Arne Slot happy as Liverpool see off Southampton to reach Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: First-half goals from Darwin Nunez and Harvey Elliott put Slot’s side through.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's message to Liverpool youngsters after Trey Nyoni debut
arts.sum: Arne Slot saw four youngsters feature as Liverpool defeated Southampton 2-1 in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals at St Mary's with some big names remaining on Merseyside

arts.ttl: Where four Liverpool players ended up speaks volumes as Arne Slot surprise pays off
arts.sum: Liverpool verdict from St Mary's as the Reds beat Southampton 2-1 to book their place in the Carabao Cup semi-finals

arts.ttl: Southampton 1-2 Liverpool PLAYER RATINGS: Which Reds star was brilliant in an unfamiliar position? Who showed encouraging signs? And which midfielder was a force all evening?
arts.sum: SOUTHAMPTON 1-2 LIVERPOOL - AADAM PATEL ST MARY'S: They did fight back in the second half, and Cameron Archer's stunning finish helped to ensure a nervy finish.

arts.ttl: Slot the difference - Liverpool's tactical tweaks under new boss
arts.sum: BBC Sport takes a closer look at some of Liverpool's more subtle tactical tweaks since Arne Slot took over from Jurgen Klopp.
